overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City's neon-lit downtown district at night. The character navigates busy sidewalks, passes various pedestrians and vehicles, descends into an underground commercial corridor, and emerges into an open plaza area.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial street with digital billboards

events.description: yellow taxi drives past on the wet street to the right
pink sports car passes by on the street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past pedestrians and street vendors

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi driving along the multi-lane street
pedestrian in white jacket with blue symbol walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: large building facade covered in colorful rainbow LED panels displaying advertisements
overhead covered pedestrian walkway with recessed ceiling lighting
blue and white striped construction barrier along the sidewalk edge
tall modern street light with horizontal LED light bar

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a neon-lit downtown sidewalk at night, passing under a covered walkway on the left. A large rainbow LED billboard dominates the right side of the frame while vehicles including a yellow taxi and pink sports car drive past on the wet street. Pedestrians walk in the same direction ahead of the character.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown commercial street with large stairway structure

events.description: passes by the wide concrete staircase structure on the left side
approaches the entrance to the underground pedestrian corridor

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk, navigating past groups of pedestrians and approaching the underground entrance

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in purple tank top and pink pants walking ahead
pedestrian sitting on bench next to advertisement poster

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs with integrated lighting leading up to building entrance
bus stop style bench with illuminated advertisement display
vertical digital billboard showing product advertisements against the night sky

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking past a large concrete staircase structure on the left. The covered walkway recedes into the distance as the character approaches an underground entrance. Pedestrians in various attire walk in mixed directions, and an advertisement bench sits on the right sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: underground pedestrian corridor with neon shops

events.description: descends stairs into the underground pedestrian corridor with graffiti-covered walls
passes the Dima a Buzz food stall with bright cyan neon signage

agents.ego_description: walking down stairs into the underground corridor and continuing through the dimly lit passage with neon shop signs

notable_agents.action: vendor standing behind the counter at the Dima a Buzz food stall
person sitting on the ground leaning against the graffiti-covered wall

entered.detail: food vendor stall with bright cyan neon signage reading Dima a Buzz
illuminated sign for pawnshop with blue neon lighting
red and black vending machine with glowing product display
concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti tags and street art
illuminated sign reading SKY HIGH above the corridor entrance

segments.scene_description: The character descends into an underground pedestrian corridor marked by a SKY HIGH sign. The walls are covered in graffiti, and neon-lit shops including the Dima a Buzz food stall line the passage. The lighting shifts to artificial as the character walks through the enclosed space, passing a few pedestrians and a person sitting against the wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with digital advertising

events.description: emerges from underground back to street level via wide concrete stairs
turns and walks across the open plaza area with scattered pedestrians

agents.ego_description: climbing the stairs out of the underground and walking across the open plaza with scattered pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red pants walking across the plaza

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs leading up from underground to plaza level
tall cylindrical structure with multiple digital screens displaying ads
small red and green vendor booth with neon lighting

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the stairs back to street level, emerging into an open urban plaza. A digital advertising pillar stands prominently on the right, while a small kiosk with neon lighting sits in the distance. The space is more open with sparse vegetation and fewer pedestrians than the main street above.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a vibrant neon-lit downtown district that descends into a gritty underground corridor before emerging into an open urban plaza. It begins on a wet sidewalk beneath a covered walkway, passing a massive rainbow LED billboard as colorful vehicles and pedestrians flow through the night. As the character moves past a concrete staircase and an advertisement bench, the scene shifts downward into an enclosed pedestrian passage marked by a SKY HIGH sign and graffiti-covered walls. The lighting becomes purely artificial while passing neon-lit shops and food stalls, before the camera ascends a set of stairs to return to street level. The environment finally opens up into a spacious plaza featuring a digital advertising pillar and a distant neon kiosk under a wider night sky.
